name_en: 💖With full original green box packaging💖Gucci Blondie Mini Bucket Bag. The Gucci Blondie series features a bold pattern paired with leather in matching tones, exuding a subtle and restrained atmosphere throughout. The series ingeniously incorporates circular geometric interlocking double G, showcasing Gucci's modern aesthetic design. Brand logo details add a unique charm to this white leather mini bucket bag adorned with tassel details. White leather, taffeta lining, circular interlocking double G leather patch, leather tassel, top handle (8cm high), detachable chain shoulder strap (55cm high), drawstring closure.
